'''âk-g-p''' ('''kakagap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:flench|flench]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:flench|flench]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakagap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikagap|thikagap]] || [[word:jikagap|jikagap]] || [[word:shikagap|shikagap]] || [[word:kikagap|kikagap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukagap|thuthukagap]] || [[word:jujukagap|jujukagap]] || [[word:shushukagap|shushukagap]] || [[word:kukukagap|kukukagap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukagap|thukagap]] || [[word:jukagap|jukagap]] || [[word:shukagap|shukagap]] || [[word:kukagap|kukagap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukagap|thukagap]] || [[word:jukagap|jukagap]] || [[word:shukagap|shukagap]] || [[word:kukagap|kukagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekagap|thekagap]] || [[word:jekagap|jekagap]] || [[word:shekagap|shekagap]] || [[word:kekagap|kekagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokagap|thothokagap]] || [[word:jojokagap|jojokagap]] || [[word:shoshokagap|shoshokagap]] || [[word:kokokagap|kokokagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokagap|thokagap]] || [[word:jokagap|jokagap]] || [[word:shokagap|shokagap]] || [[word:kokagap|kokagap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokagap|thokagap]] || [[word:jokagap|jokagap]] || [[word:shokagap|shokagap]] || [[word:kokagap|kokagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkagap|thĂŠkagap]] || [[word:jĂŠkagap|jĂŠkagap]] || [[word:shĂŠkagap|shĂŠkagap]] || [[word:kĂŠkagap|kĂŠkagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakagap|thathakagap]] || [[word:jajakagap|jajakagap]] || [[word:shashakagap|shashakagap]] || [[word:kakakagap|kakakagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakagap|thakagap]] || [[word:jakagap|jakagap]] || [[word:shakagap|shakagap]] || [[word:kakagap|kakagap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakagap|thakagap]] || [[word:jakagap|jakagap]] || [[word:shakagap|shakagap]] || [[word:kakagap|kakagap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakagap|shakagap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakagap|goshakagap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakagap|gokishakagap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakagapnĂŒ|shakagapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakagapnknĂŒ|goshakagapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagapnĂŒ|gokishakagapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakagapshĂ«|shakagapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakagapnkshĂ«|goshakagapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakagapshĂ«|gokishakagapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagapro|shakagapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagapnkro|goshakagapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagapro|gokishakagapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagapmu|shakagapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagapnkmu|goshakagapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagapmu|gokishakagapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakagapsher|shakagapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakagapnksher|goshakagapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakagapsher|gokishakagapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakagapng|shakagapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakagapnkng|goshakagapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakagapng|gokishakagapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakagapya|shakagapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakagapnkya|goshakagapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakagapya|gokishakagapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakagapyam|shakagapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakagapnkyam|goshakagapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakagapyam|gokishakagapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagapnĂŒshĂ«|shakagapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakagapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakagapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagapnĂŒro|shakagapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagapnknĂŒro|goshakagapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagapnĂŒro|gokishakagapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagapnĂŒmu|shakagapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagapnknĂŒmu|goshakagapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagapnĂŒmu|gokishakagapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagapshĂ«nĂŒ|shakagapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakagapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakagapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagapshĂ«ro|shakagapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagapnkshĂ«ro|goshakagapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagapshĂ«ro|gokishakagapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagapshĂ«mu|shakagapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagapnkshĂ«mu|goshakagapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagapshĂ«mu|gokishakagapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagapronĂŒ|shakagapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagapnkronĂŒ|goshakagapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagapronĂŒ|gokishakagapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagaproshĂ«|shakagaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagapnkroshĂ«|goshakagapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagaproshĂ«|gokishakagaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakagapromu|shakagapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakagapnkromu|goshakagapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakagapromu|gokishakagapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakagapmunĂŒ|shakagapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakagapnkmunĂŒ|goshakagapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakagapmunĂŒ|gokishakagapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakagapmushĂ«|shakagapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakagapnkmushĂ«|goshakagapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakagapmushĂ«|gokishakagapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakagapmuro|shakagapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakagapnkmuro|goshakagapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakagapmuro|gokishakagapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
